word: H6638 - צָבָה - tsâbâh - tsaw-baw' - Fight swell

sections.paragraph:
Original: צבה

Transliteration: tsâbâh

Phonetic: tsaw-baw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to swell, swell up
    1. (Qal) to swell (of adulteress' belly)
    2. (Hiphil) to cause to swell (of adulteress' belly)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1868

Part(s) of speech: Verb
